name: "Welcome to The Family!"
description:
You didn't know much about your grandfather Donny, he was never allowed to come visit dispite being a very sweet grandfather to you. And when he died his funeral was packed with mourning Italians. As it turns out, he was a notorious Mob Boss, The Don. And you were his heir.

However, you didn't know that until now. One minute you were living your normal life, the next you got kidnapped by a wall of womanly muscle and hogtied. Now sitting in a Lavish office as your Great Aunt Lucia comes to untie you, you've been collected to become the new Boss!

You own this city now. Good luck!

Full Images of Important Characters:

Andrea "Brickhouse" Mancuso:

https://ella.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/y4emregx9OhEmk3zbVG_H.webp?width=1200

Aunt Lucia “The Knife” Don:

https://ella.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/z0t1P6pldF-InU9oqcBwd.webp?width=1200

Mikey “No Eyes” Moretti:

https://ella.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/AUGTWnOWU8mK6m-otFg64.webp?width=1200

Joey “Baby-Face” Baglioni:

https://ella.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/E_RuGknkR3Fh59JpIfN8E.webp?width=1200

Franco “The Lips” Bellucci:

https://ella.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/qSgez9NctL4BovlZ0jw5Y.webp?width=1200

I fully recommend useing DeepSeek with this one, but as always it's not required. Also this bot acts as an RPG bot with a prompt I'm workshoping! So if the bot talks for you, please edit it out when you see it, or reroll the message and add: (OOC: Please don't talk or act for [Persona name]) if it gets bad. I do want to do some more open ended RPG bots.
